name: io.github.wppoland/woocommerce-mcp
description: Read-only MCP server for WordPress + WooCommerce products, orders, sales, and posts.

environmentVariables.name: WP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the WordPress / WooCommerce store (HTTPS)

environmentVariables.name: WC_CONSUMER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer key (Read permission)

environmentVariables.name: WC_CONSUMER_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer secret (Read permission)
